name: Doorbell
description: Auto-triggered on Home Assistant motion or doorbell events. Displays a snapshot or live MJPEG stream from the configured camera.

theme.description: Color scheme. Auto follows the device/OS preference.

font_family.description: Typeface for the alert label and countdown.

alert_style.description: How the doorbell alert is presented over the camera feed.

accent_color.description: Alert accent color. Leave empty for theme destructive red.

show_countdown.description: Show a countdown timer when auto_dismiss_seconds is set.

auto_dismiss_seconds.description: Optional seconds until auto-dismiss. Pair with show_countdown and match your HA claim duration.

snapshot_url.description: Camera snapshot URL or MJPEG stream

is_stream.description: Treat as a continuous stream rather than a still

refresh_ms.description: Snapshot refresh interval in milliseconds (ignored when is_stream is true).

label.description: Alert text shown over the camera feed.
